title: Souls Awakening
description: A mod inspired by the bleach anime/manga from the author Tite Kubo!
body:
# Minecraft mod in the version of minecraft 1.16.5, inspired by the bleach universe. 
## This mod has for purpose to add bleach-like features to the vanilla minecraft gameplay WITH vanilla tweaks to get a better 'rpg' feel such as:
- stat points
- choosable races
- removing of natural critical
- abilities
- etc.
## For the bleach like features:
- hollows
- quincy, shinigami, spirit and hollows race
- Zanpakuto
- Spirit weapons
- etc. etc.
## Besides the rpg additions and tweaks there are generation additions (but no tweaks yet) such as:
- new dimensions (hueco Mundo, soul society, shadow of soul society
There are also entities, new ones! The trader that will sell you items, hollows that will try and kill you or even shinigami that are friend or foe depending on your race.
To make this more engaging there are other additions such as:
- challenges you can take on!
